summary: Workflow uses pinned action refs and minimal permissions (✓), but critical issues undermine the deliverable: (1) Mock data embedded in src/index.ts violates separation of test/production code; (2) Script has no input validation (parseArtifacts, applyRetentionPolicies don't check nulls/empty); (3) Workflow verification lines 48-70 and 109-135 duplicate logic; (4) Hardcoded mock data makes testing non-extensible—can't inject different scenarios; (5) No actionlint validation step despite task requirement; (6) TDD methodology undemonstrated (no test files shown, though task required 'write failing test FIRST'). Script logic is sound, but structure prevents real use: to run against actual artifacts, code would require rewrite. Would not ship without separating test fixtures, adding input validation, and refactoring for configurability.
